case.title: STATE OF MISSOURI EX REL WOODS v. SEVIER

opinion.h: STATE OF MISSOURI EX REL WOODS v. SEVIER, 296 U.S. 626 (1935)
The STATE OF MISSOURI, at the relation of Weightstill WOODS, petitioner, v. Hon. Nike G. SEVIER.* No. 416.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. George A. Edwards, of Chicago, Ill., for petitioner.
No opinion filed in court below.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the Supreme Court of the State of Missouri denied.
* Rehearing denied 296 U.S. 663, 56 S. Ct. 178.[ State of Missouri ex rel Woods v. Sevier 296 U.S. 626 (1935) ]
